mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session (user_id1, user_id2, update_time) VALUES (#{userId1}, #{userId2}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id1 as userId1, user_id2 as userId2, last_message_id as lastMessageId, update_time as updateTime FROM chat_session WHERE (user_id1 = #{userId1} AND user_id2 = #{userId2}) OR (user_id1 = #{userId2} AND user_id2 = #{userId1})
